title: Under the Wave off Kanagawa (The Great Wave)
subtitle: A study in motion, repeated curves, and the tension between small human craft and large natural force.
medium: Woodblock print; ink and color on paper
look_prompt: Trace the biggest wave first, then find three smaller echoing shapes that repeat its curve.
make_prompt: Turn one section of the wave into a black-line coloring study, then add your own patterned water marks around it.

image.alt: Katsushika Hokusai's Under the Wave off Kanagawa, showing a towering wave over boats with Mount Fuji in the distance.
